mechanism_narrative: Sustained growth in retail sales reflects robust consumer spending that drives corporate revenue expectations and produces positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Spearman correlation between monthly RSAFS change and SPX 20d forward returns falls below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: An elevated CPIAUCSL reading above 235 signals persistent inflation that forces the Federal Reserve to tighten monetary policy faster than earnings can adapt, generating negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX 60d forward returns are positive in more than 50% of instances when CPIAUCSL exceeds 235 over a 5-year backtest.

mechanism_narrative: Jointly accelerating payroll employment and a declining unemployment rate signal an overheating labor market that intensifies Federal Reserve hawkishness, and this interaction predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The interaction term between PAYEMS change and UNRATE change in a bivariate regression yields a t-statistic below 1.5 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: During a monetary tightening cycle, month-over-month growth in industrial production signals persistent supply-side inflation pressure that forces the Federal Reserve to maintain hawkish policy, predicting negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: INDPRO growth coincides with positive SPX 5d forward returns in more than 50% of tightening-cycle months.

mechanism_narrative: An announced increase in the federal funds rate raises the risk-free discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days as equity risk premiums reprice immediately.
failure_condition: SPX 5d forward returns are non-negative in more than 55% of months when FEDFUNDS increases.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in housing starts signals deteriorating residential investment and broader demand weakness, predicting negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days as earnings expectations reset lower.
failure_condition: HOUST declines coincide with positive SPX 60d returns in more than 50% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous rise in the unemployment rate and a fall in industrial production confirm a joint contraction in labor and supply conditions, predicting negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Bivariate rank correlation of the UNRATE-INDPRO interaction with SPX 20d returns is below 0.03 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter growth in real GDP above trend validates corporate top-line resilience and predicts positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: GDPC1 growth above 2% coincides with negative SPX 60d returns in more than 50% of observations.
